goals: Understand how AI agents handle unknown contacts and manage access control
Learn about the different access tiers and their restrictions
Explore the stranger-to-approved contact approval workflow

user_agent_config.personality: Inquisitive and detail-oriented, but unfamiliar with technical implementations. Asks clarifying questions and wants to understand the 'why' behind systems.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic concepts of messaging apps and privacy but has no knowledge of access control APIs, tool names, or technical implementation details. Learning about AI agent security for a school project.

end_condition: The student has explored the access control system enough to understand how tiered permissions work and how strangers become approved contacts.
